rationale: The citing paper references Liu, Lee, and Srinivasan (2019) only once in a grouped literature-review sentence as an example of prior work linking review content to sales. The paper does not rely on that study for its conceptual framework, identification strategy, hypotheses, variable construction, or interpretation of core results; instead it positions Vana and Lambrecht (2021) as the closest prior work. This indicates a background citation role rather than a distinct functional dependency.
